allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Custom domain:', d.get\('custom_domain'\)\); print\('HTTPS enforced:', d.get\('https_enforced'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Renamed to:', d.get\('full_name'\)\); print\('URL:', d.get\('html_url'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Repo:', d['full_name']\); print\('Default branch:', d['default_branch']\); print\('Empty:', d['size']==0\); print\('URL:', d['html_url']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['path']\) for f in d.get\('tree',[]\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(f['name']\) for f in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
